name: t/d Mini Dog Food
description: Hill's Prescription Diet t/d Small Bites Dry Dog Food is clinically shown to reduce plaque, stain & tartar buildup and clean up to the gum line in small dogs. It works like a toothbrush, dental floss and mouthwash all in one and is formulated as a complete and balanced nutritional solution for your dog's daily health regimen. The kibble contains clinically proven triple action fiber matrix technology to remove plaque & tartar buildup.
